name: Stefon Harris
abstract: Stefon DeLeon Harris (born March 23, 1973) is an American jazz vibraphonist.

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: That recording, I had a group at the time that included – there’s two female players. One was a drummer, Kim Thompson, and Anne Drummond, the flautist. Stefon Harris played vibes, and Kiyoshi Kitagawa [bass].
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Burton
about_quotes.evidence: I’m always next to Chick, sharing that with him. So it was fascinating to watch...not that Stefon was sort of imitating me or anything, but just to hear that song and see it being performed by the two of them... I was curious to see how he would play the tune.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gary Burton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Weber
about_quotes.evidence: as was Stefon Harris, who played about twenty instruments... Stefon Harris, Jason Moran, named the Kennedy Center adviser, and Hiromi.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Weber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 2, 2012
